Visiual Communication Design

About the Department

MENU

Visual Communication Design combines the visual arts, design and technology. Our program offers a multidisciplinary study area with an emphasis on technology and creativity.  Our students gain knowledge and hands on experience in print, time-based and interactive media. Visual Communication Design Program aims at teaching and training designers and artists who will be critical voices and innovators in the creative industry.  Department facilities include art studios, photography studio, media and visual communications labs, printmaking studio, wood and metal workshops. Photography, Graphic Design, Advertising, Visual Arts, Print Making, Video, Film, Media and New Media, Publishing, Web Design, and Interactive Design are some of the study areas offered.
